scripts.install: yarn --cwd frontend install && go mod tidy && yarn build
scripts.freshen: rm -rf data && mkdir data && cp $HOME/.local/share/trueblocks/poetry/poetry.db data/ && cp -r $HOME/.local/share/trueblocks/poetry/images data/ && cp -r $HOME/.local/share/trueblocks/poetry/tts-cache data/ && cp $HOME/.local/share/trueblocks/poetry/app_config.json . && sqlite3 data/poetry.db 'VACUUM; PRAGMA wal_checkpoint(TRUNCATE);' && rm -f data/poetry.db-wal data/poetry.db-shm && tar -czf data.tar.gz -C data . && mkdir -p backend/seeding && mv data.tar.gz backend/seeding/
